## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `just lint` and `just test` pass locally
- [ ] Snapshots reviewed (`cargo insta review`) if CLI output changed
- [ ] Docs / `CHANGELOG` not needed, or updated
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or real blog data committed
